Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}Hmmm... The conversation ended so soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}Should I talk about club activities...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}No, that's no good... I already did that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}Gotta find something to talk about... But what...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}The conversation died again... I keep sweating...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}Is it because of the heat, or is this a cold sweat...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}The beach... She's asking me to go to the beach...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}How did this happen? Am I really allowed to go...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}Why am I like this...? How many months has it been dating her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}"What's more important to you, soccer or me?" A-A question like that...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}She must be unhappy with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}I asked her on a date, but she said no, saying she didn't want to go into town...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}Is it because it's getting cold, or is it something I did...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}Going to the mountains...? Did I really say that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}But to really get the mountain experience, we'll need two days and one night at a hotel...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}I mean, no! No no no! We've got to get back before sunset...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}L-Let's hold hands or something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}N-Never mind! Forget about what I just said![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}*sigh* What was I thinking...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}Even if it seemed like a good chance, I can't believe I actually said that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}But I can't let things stay the way they are forever...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}The whole town has been feeling off lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}*sigh*... I'm getting worried...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 420}I wonder if she's okay... She's acting the same as usual...[n]{f 1 1}
